name: NIST CSF
description: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 - Core Functions and Categories

requirements.requirement_text: Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried.
requirements.expected_evidence: Asset inventory policy, CMDB documentation, hardware tracking procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish and maintain a comprehensive asset inventory including all physical devices, systems, and endpoints with ownership and classification.

requirements.requirement_text: Software platforms and applications within the organization are inventoried.
requirements.expected_evidence: Software asset management policy, application inventory list
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement software asset management (SAM) to track all applications, versions, and licenses.

requirements.requirement_text: Organizational communication and data flows are mapped.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data flow diagrams, network architecture documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Create and maintain data flow diagrams showing how information moves between systems and external parties.

requirements.requirement_text: Resources (hardware, devices, data, software) are prioritized based on their classification, criticality, and business value.
requirements.expected_evidence: Asset classification policy, criticality ratings documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Define asset classification criteria and assign criticality ratings to all inventoried assets.

requirements.requirement_text: Asset vulnerabilities are identified and documented.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vulnerability scan reports, vulnerability management policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement regular vulnerability scanning and maintain a documented vulnerability management program.

requirements.requirement_text: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources.
requirements.expected_evidence: Threat intelligence subscription records, threat briefing documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Subscribe to relevant threat intelligence feeds and integrate findings into risk assessments.

requirements.requirement_text: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to determine risk.
requirements.expected_evidence: Risk assessment reports, risk register, risk treatment plans
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct formal risk assessments using a standardized methodology that evaluates threats, vulnerabilities, and business impact.

requirements.requirement_text: Identities and credentials are issued, managed, verified, revoked, and audited for authorized devices, users and processes.
requirements.expected_evidence: IAM policy, user provisioning procedures, access review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement centralized identity and access management with automated provisioning, deprovisioning, and periodic access reviews.

requirements.requirement_text: Remote access is managed.
requirements.expected_evidence: Remote access policy, VPN configuration, MFA requirements for remote access
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce MFA for all remote access and implement zero-trust network access controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Access permissions and authorizations are managed, incorporating the principles of least privilege and separation of duties.
requirements.expected_evidence: RBAC matrix, least privilege policy, SoD controls documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement role-based access control with least privilege principles and enforce separation of duties for critical functions.

requirements.requirement_text: Users, devices, and other assets are authenticated commensurate with the risk of the transaction.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authentication policy, MFA deployment documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy multi-factor authentication for all users, especially for privileged and remote access.

requirements.requirement_text: Data-at-rest is protected.
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption policy, encryption implementation documentation for databases and storage
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt all sensitive data at rest using industry-standard algorithms (AES-256) for databases, file systems, and backups.

requirements.requirement_text: Data-in-transit is protected.
requirements.expected_evidence: TLS configuration standards, certificate management policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all data in transit and implement certificate management procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Protections against data leaks are implemented.
requirements.expected_evidence: DLP policy, DLP tool configuration, data classification labels
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy data loss prevention controls to detect and prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.

requirements.requirement_text: A baseline configuration of information technology/industrial control systems is created and maintained.
requirements.expected_evidence: Baseline configuration standards, hardening guides, configuration management database
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and enforce security baseline configurations based on CIS benchmarks or vendor hardening guides.

requirements.requirement_text: Backups of information are conducted, maintained, and tested periodically.
requirements.expected_evidence: Backup policy, backup schedules, restore test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement automated backups with encryption and conduct quarterly restore testing.

requirements.requirement_text: Data is destroyed according to policy.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data retention and destruction policy, sanitization certificates
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish data retention schedules and secure destruction procedures for all media types.

requirements.requirement_text: Maintenance and repair of organizational assets are performed and logged, with approved and controlled tools.
requirements.expected_evidence: Maintenance procedures, change management records
requirements.recommendation_text: Document maintenance procedures and ensure all changes are logged and approved through change management.

requirements.requirement_text: Audit/log records are determined, documented, implemented, and reviewed in accordance with policy.
requirements.expected_evidence: Logging policy, SIEM configuration, log review procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement centralized logging with SIEM integration and define log retention and review schedules.

requirements.requirement_text: The principle of least functionality is incorporated by configuring systems to provide only essential capabilities.
requirements.expected_evidence: System hardening standards, unnecessary service disablement documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Disable unnecessary services, ports, and protocols on all systems per hardening standards.

requirements.requirement_text: A baseline of network operations and expected data flows for users and systems is established and managed.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network baseline documentation, anomaly detection configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish network traffic baselines and configure anomaly detection to identify deviations.

requirements.requirement_text: Event data are collected and correlated from multiple sources and sensors.
requirements.expected_evidence: SIEM correlation rules, security monitoring dashboard, alert configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy SIEM with correlation rules across all security sensors and critical infrastructure.

requirements.requirement_text: The network is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network monitoring tools configuration, IDS/IPS deployment documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy network intrusion detection/prevention systems with 24/7 monitoring coverage.

requirements.requirement_text: Malicious code is detected.
requirements.expected_evidence: EDR/antivirus deployment documentation, malware detection reports
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) on all endpoints with real-time malware scanning.

requirements.requirement_text: Response plan is executed during or after an incident.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident response plan, incident response playbooks, tabletop exercise records
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop and maintain an incident response plan with defined roles, communication procedures, and regular tabletop exercises.

requirements.requirement_text: Incidents are reported consistent with established criteria.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident reporting procedures, escalation matrix, notification templates
requirements.recommendation_text: Define incident severity criteria and establish clear reporting and escalation procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Notifications from detection systems are investigated.
requirements.expected_evidence: SOC procedures, alert triage documentation, investigation records
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish SOC procedures for investigating and triaging security alerts within defined SLAs.

requirements.requirement_text: Recovery plan is executed during or after a cybersecurity incident.
requirements.expected_evidence: Disaster recovery plan, BCP documentation, recovery test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain and test disaster recovery and business continuity plans with defined RTOs and RPOs.

requirements.requirement_text: Recovery plans incorporate lessons learned.
requirements.expected_evidence: Post-incident review reports, plan update records
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct post-incident reviews and update recovery plans based on lessons learned.

requirements.requirement_text: The organizational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management.
requirements.expected_evidence: Cybersecurity governance charter, risk management framework documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Align cybersecurity program with organizational mission and establish a governance framework.

requirements.requirement_text: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders.
requirements.expected_evidence: Risk appetite statement, risk management policy, board approval records
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and document organizational risk appetite and tolerance levels approved by leadership.

requirements.requirement_text: Policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organizational context and risk tolerance.
requirements.expected_evidence: Information security policy, policy review records, employee acknowledgment
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop comprehensive information security policies reviewed annually and acknowledged by all personnel.

requirements.requirement_text: A cybersecurity supply chain risk management program is established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders.
requirements.expected_evidence: Third-party risk management policy, vendor assessment procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement a third-party risk management program with vendor security assessments and contractual requirements.

requirements.requirement_text: Cybersecurity risk management strategy outcomes are reviewed to inform and adjust strategy and policy.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security metrics dashboard, board reporting, program review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish cybersecurity KPIs and report program effectiveness to leadership quarterly.

requirements.requirement_text: All users are informed and trained.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security awareness training program, training completion records, phishing test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement mandatory security awareness training with annual refreshers and simulated phishing exercises.
